value.string: This Bot automatically login to the salesforce and it will read input data(costumer details) from the excel sheet and create a customer contact then enter the details to the salesforce
Launch Wenbsite and login to the Salesforce
Open Excel and Stored Login credentials to variable
Enter your Login credentials to the provided Excel sheet
Above actions are read the excel file and stored  login credentials to specified variables
Enter the credentials and login the salesforce
input r4 wide mb16 mt8 username
<input class="input r4 wide mb16 mt8 username" type="email" value="" name="username" id="username" aria-describedby="error" style="display: block;">
input r4 wide mb16 mt8 password
<input class="input r4 wide mb16 mt8 password" type="password" id="password" name="pw" onkeypress="checkCaps(event)" autocomplete="off">
<input class="button r4 wide primary" type="submit" id="Login" name="Login" value="Log In">
Open the customer deatils and read the input data from the excel sheet
